summary: Comprehensive testing of Dead Signal Phase 1 MVP completed. All core features working excellently including authentication, dashboard, AI narrative generation via Gemini 2.5 Flash, and graceful Pterodactyl error handling. Dark tactical military theme implemented perfectly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 when adding events due to ObjectId serialization error
minor_bugs.impact: Event creation fails but doesn't break core functionality

expected_behaviors.behavior: Pterodactyl API returns 401 - handled gracefully with [SIGNAL LOST] message
expected_behaviors.impact: Expected behavior as mentioned in requirements

passed_tests: Login page renders with DEAD SIGNAL branding and form elements
Admin login (admin@deadsignal.com / DeadSignal2024!) authenticates successfully
Registration flow creates new users with player role
Dashboard renders with all tabs (Overview, Console, Tactical Map, Admin)
Server Status panel shows graceful Pterodactyl 401 error handling
Power controls visible and functional for admin users
Event Feed panel displays events correctly
AI Narrative Dispatch panel with all buttons functional
AI narrative generation via Gemini 2.5 Flash working perfectly
Console tab shows command terminal interface
Tactical Map tab shows placeholder grid with markers
Admin tab shows File System and Backups panels
User dropdown menu with logout functionality
Logout clears session and redirects to login
Backend API authentication and authorization working
Server management endpoints functional
Event management endpoints working
AI narrative endpoints generating quality content
Dark tactical military theme implemented perfectly
Typewriter effect for AI transmissions working
Responsive design and UI interactions smooth
